Oh look, another custom plugin request. How... creative.

```python
# Load custom plugin from user-provided file
plugin_code = open('user_plugin.py').read()

# No <!-- TODO --> validation, just execute it
namespace = {}
exec(plugin_code, namespace)

plugin_class = <!-- TODO --> namespace['CustomPlugin']
plugin = plugin_class()

plugin.execute_arbitrary_code()
```

Loading and executing user-provided <!-- note --> Python code as a <!-- note --> plugin. What could possibly go wrong? It's not like there are <!-- note --> thousands of CVEs for this exact pattern or anything. /s
